calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Discharged
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Order of Examination of defendant Silvia Hildebrandt.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff, who was not present.
Defendant Silvia Hildebrandt was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined by Mr. Cohen.
Defendant Mauricio Henriquez was present, but he was not scheduled for an Order of Examination, and was instructed that his attendance was not required.
